title: staff — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing Staff + Coach CRUD + lifecycle actions (~30 routes) + platform-admin cross-tenant support routes. Every tenant-plane route carries `auth:sanctum` + `tenant.resolve` + policy check via the route-level `permission` metadata. The `/staff/{staff}/compensation` and `/staff/{staff}/emergency-contact` sub-resources are separate endpoints (not fields on the parent) so we can attach dedicated middleware (`staff.enforce_compensation_permission`) that refuses the whole endpoint when the caller lacks the field-level permission — cleaner than embedded redaction on the parent read.

groups.name: tenant-staff
groups.description: Staff CRUD + lifecycle. The `staff` feature has no tier gate (every tier has staff); tier-gated capabilities (compensation, org-chart) are enforced at the sub-resource + field level.

routes.description: filter[branch_id], filter[employment_status], filter[employment_type], filter[position], filter[department], filter[is_branch_manager], filter[reports_to_staff_id]. Scope: caller's active branch narrows results when set.

Body: StaffHireData. Consumes 1 unit of staff_slot entitlement. Compensation fields REFUSED unless caller also carries `staff.manage.compensation`. Emergency contact fields REFUSED unless caller carries `staff.manage.emergency_contact`.

Compensation + emergency contact fields REDACTED unless caller carries the respective `.view.compensation` / `.view.emergency_contact` permissions. Self-view via .own suffix returns own row unredacted.

Body: StaffUpdateData (excludes user_id, started_at [when status != pre_hire], branch_id [Wave 2b immutable], compensation_*, emergency_contact_*). Compensation + emergency contact updates use their dedicated sub-resource endpoints.
Soft-delete. Refused unless employment_status='offboarded'.
Body: { demote_current_manager: bool = true }. When true, the current active branch_manager is demoted in the same transaction; when false, refuses if another manager exists.
Body: { reason? }. Warns when this leaves the branch without a manager.
Body: { leave_type, expected_return_at? }. Cascades: pauses linked Coach if any.
Body: { suspension_reason, suspension_expires_at? }. Audit-critical. Cascades: pauses linked Coach.

Body: { termination_reason, termination_notes?, ended_at?, cascade: bool = false }. When cascade=true, archives linked Coach + removes team memberships (requires `staff.offboard.cascade`). Two-phase transition: active/on_leave/suspended → offboarding (fires StaffOffboardingStarted) → offboarded (fires StaffOffboarded). Caller must confirm offboarding→offboarded via a second POST or via ?complete=true on the first call.
Body: { started_at?: date }. Rehire path — consumes 1 unit of staff_slot; resets ended_at + termination_reason. Rare; audit-critical.
Dedicated sub-resource so the compensation-permission middleware can refuse the whole endpoint. Returns compensation_* fields + a paginated history from staff_compensation_history.

Body: CompensationUpdateData. Fires CompensationChanged event (private-tier). Writes to staff_compensation_history audit table (7-year retention). Refuses when delta exceeds config.staff.compensation.max_delta_percent unless caller carries `staff.manage.compensation.large-delta`.
Emergency contact + tax_id_last4.
Returns the direct reports (staff with reports_to_staff_id = this). Requires staff_org_chart entitlement — refused with 402 otherwise.
filter[branch_id] (via join through staff), filter[sport_key], filter[coaching_level], filter[status], filter[rating.gte]
Body: CoachCreateData with staff_id (required — the parent Staff must exist and be active). Consumes 1 unit of coach_slot.
Body: CoachUpdateData (excludes staff_id [immutable], rating [job-only], sport_key [dedicated endpoint]).
Soft-delete. Refused unless status='archived'.
Body: { reason? }. Coach.status active → paused.
Body: { reason? }. Terminal. Removes future team assignments.
Body: CertificationEntry. When coach_certifications_verified entitlement is on, enters `pending_verification` state; HR verifies via /certifications/{certification}/verify.
Body: { document_file_id: ULID }. Uploads signed document + promotes certification pending_verification → verified. Requires coach_certifications_verified entitlement.
Body: { reason? }. Fires CoachCertificationRemoved.
Body: { availability_pattern }. Fires CoachAvailabilityChanged.
Body: { sport_key }. Fires CoachSportChanged. Coaches CANNOT self-reclassify — HR + admin + owner only.

groups.name: platform-staff
groups.description: Cross-tenant read + compensation audit for support tooling. Compensation ALWAYS redacted at this plane — support staff never see tenant compensation figures. The audit-compensation endpoint is super_admin-only.

routes.description: filter[tenant_id], filter[employment_status], filter[branch_id]. Cross-tenant scan. Compensation fields always stripped.
Compensation ALWAYS redacted at platform plane regardless of caller permissions. Emergency contact stripped except for super_admin.

Compliance-only export. Emits a signed audit CSV of every compensation change in the last N days. Every invocation is P1 audit-logged + super_admin-gated. Two-person approval required (audit critical).
